shortDescription.text: Content verified as non-malicious and educational.

fullDescription.text: This skill's content has been reviewed and confirmed to be educational documentation for Go best practices. No malicious intent, behaviors, or indicators were found. External threat intelligence does not link this specific skill to known malicious campaigns or actors.

message.text: The 'go-best-practices' skill content has been verified as educational documentation. Threat intelligence provided general context on agent skill supply chain risks but REFUTED any specific suspicion for this skill. No specific suspicious lines were identified in the Initial_Analysis. No confirmed malicious intent or behaviors were identified. All code snippets are illustrative examples and not executable components of the skill.
